title: Opella Task Kitchen Towel Super Absorbent Jumbo Rolls – 3X Jumbo Rolls – Ideal for Spills, Cleaning Windows and Messes All Around – All Purpose - Jumbo Size for Extra Use, White
features: 3X JUMBO ROLLS - To keep your house clean.
SUPER ABSORBENT - For effective cleaning of spills.
ALL-PURPOSE - For any cleaning challenges you may stumble across.
EASY TO USE - A tear apart seaming between each sheet to make for easy use.
JUMBO SIZE - Meaning these rolls will last longer than others!
description: Product description Task Kitchen Towel Jumbo Roll Super Absorbent– 3x Rolls of Kitchen Roll These Task Jumbo Roll Super Absorbent Kitchen Towels are made from pulp that is ideal for spills, cleaning windows and pet messes! Within this pack, there are 3 rolls of Task Jumbo Roll Super Absorbent Kitchen Towels to keep you going throughout the week. No need to panic if a mess occurs, just grab the towels and get to cleaning! With extra absorption and double ply material, these Task Jumbo Roll Super Absorbent Kitchen Towels can clean up any spillages you might experience in the kitchen with effectiveness and ease. Ultra All-Purpose Kitchen Towels are made up of 2-ply paper and 45 sheets per towel roll, making them perfect to keep in your kitchen for any quick cleaning needed to be done on the go. With easy to use tear apart seaming between each sheet, even your little ones can help with the kitchen clean! Ultra All-Purpose Kitchen Towels are also proudly made in England for your use every day, support the production systems of the UK by making these paper towels an every day essential in your kitchen. Specifications: Task Kitchen Towel Jumbo Roll Super Absorbent 3x Rolls 2 ply. Colour: white. Quantity: 3x Rolls Comes packed in a plastic bag packaging. Super absorbency. Ideal for spills and cleaning windows. Use to clean up pet messes, vehicles, house hold spills and even in the garden!
